title: Compress the vet-software sizing to one bullet
guidance: Reward the bullet that packs the most decision-relevant content into the fewest words and reads like a partner wrote it. Penalise padding, vagueness, or an AI 'feel'.

runner_input.instruction: Capture the essence of the material below in a single bullet for an IC slide.
runner_input.constraints: Output: exactly one markdown bullet (start with '- '). Max 30 words. No title, no second bullet.

source_blocks.text: UK independent veterinary practice management software. RCVS practice counts. Synthetic.

items: Incumbents: 2 legacy vendors ~60% share, on-premise, last major release 4+ yrs ago, NPS ~12
Tailwind: cloud + 2025 RCVS digital clinical-record guideline + pet-insurance APIs lower switching cost

rubric_notes: Should pair the £271m SAM with the displaceability wedge (stale incumbents).
